title: Is it practical to host a real production app on a Mac mini?
abstract: I want to try out some personal projects, and although personal projects often don't get much traffic, I'd like to make it capable of scaling upto tens of thousands of users. I've seen free tiers of DB providers like cockroachdb, supabase etc, but they seem to be very limited in stora
abstract_zh: 想在家用 Mac mini 主机上搞个个人项目，梦想是几十万用户也能流畅运行？别急，CockroachDB 和 Supabase 的免费 tier 就像你妈妈做的牛肉面，味道一般般，量还不足。不过话说回来，Mac mini 咋整也得有点儿门道吧！
